prompt: The home-energy dashboard has been flat-lining since we moved aggregation onto the daemon's hub. Readings are definitely flowing — a throwaway function subscriber I added logs every single one — but every meter's total and average sits at 0 all day, metersSeen() comes back empty, and the dropout log never records the attic meter going dark even when I can see the dropout events being published. No errors anywhere, it just silently collects nothing. `node --test test_stats.ts` reproduces it. Fix the code so the collector actually collects; the tests are the acceptance bar, don't touch them.
